name: Breakfast Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and baking powder into a mixing bowl.
2. Add salt and sugar, then rub in the butter using fingertips until mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Beat eggs into the mixture to form a soft dough.
4. Turn out onto a lightly floured surface and knead gently.
5. Form into rounds or squares, fold over twice, and brush with milk.
6. Place on an oiled baking sheet and bake in a hot oven (450°F) for about 15 minutes.
8 servings.
